description:
Log a new Sales Opportunity in iDempiere's CRM for the customer 'C&W Construction' using the following details:
- Subject: 'Oak Street Office Park'
- Expected Amount: 120,000 USD
- Probability: 40%
- Sales Stage: A stage related to 'Proposal' or 'Quote'
- Expected Close Date: Exactly 3 months from today
- Description: 'Customer bidding on office park project. Requires 50 large oak trees.'
